name: kerby
description: kerby — the gate guardian for agentic coding. A loadable rule-corpus plus opt-in guardrail hooks that govern how an AI agent does coding work: clarity over cleverness, safety over speed, never leave the repo broken, and nothing unproven passes the gate. Load it into a session, reload after compaction, install per-project hooks, prepare an existing repo, or audit a repo's conformance to the rules.

interface.shortDescription: The gate guardian for agentic coding: loadable rules plus opt-in guardrail hooks.
interface.longDescription: kerby packages coding guardrails for Codex sessions. Use it to load a rule corpus, prepare repositories for disciplined agentic coding, install opt-in hooks, reload rules after compaction, or audit whether a repo follows the expected workflow.
defaultPrompt: Load kerby for this coding session.
Audit this repo against kerby coding guardrails.
Prepare this repo for disciplined agentic coding.
